commit_message:
Fix lite build Fix lite build Looks like something was missed from SMS.sv in mister-devel/master.

We tried to sync with you, and the result wasn't buildable by our CI. This is just the one-line fix to make the code buildable again. 

https://circleci.com/gh/OpenVGS/SMS_MiSTer/23#artifacts/containers/0

You can see the results there. If you don't want to pull in the circle-ci stuff, let me know and I'll remove them from the PR. If you don't use it, it'll just sit there, so I don't see the

examples.commit_message:
Fix lite build Fix lite build Looks like something was missed from SMS.sv in mister-devel/master.

We tried to sync with you, and the result wasn't buildable by our CI. This is just the one-line fix to make the code buildable again. 

https://circleci.com/gh/OpenVGS/SMS_MiSTer/23#artifacts/containers/0

You can see the results there. If you don't want to pull in the circle-ci stuff, let me know and I'll remove them from the PR. If you don't use it, it'll just sit there, so I don't see the
examples.patch:
@@ -48,6 +48,7 @@ module emu
 	output        VGA_HS,
 	output        VGA_VS,
 	output        VGA_DE,    // = ~(VBlank | HBlank)
+	output        VGA_F1,
 	output  [1:0] VGA_SL,
 
 	output        LED_USER,  // 1 - ON, 0 - OFF.
